info.title: Ranqly API Documentation
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the Ranqly Web3 Ranking and Contest Engine.
        
        This API provides endpoints for:
        - Content scoring and analysis
        - Dispute management and resolution
        - Web content crawling and extraction
        - Audit trails and verification
        - DAO governance and voting
        - User management and authentication
        - Contest and submission management
        
        All services have been migrated from Python to Node.js for improved performance and maintainability.
